🎭 Lucknow's First Performing Arts Café

Live Music · Poetry Nights · Art Exhibitions · Book Readings · Cultural Events
Our Story

A place where stories are served

Cafe Repertwahr is Lucknow's most loved literary café — a 3rd-floor rooftop sanctuary on Faizabad Road where over 5,000 curated books line every wall, Moroccan lanterns cast a warm glow, and lush plants frame every corner.

As the city's first performing arts café, Repertwahr also hosts live music, poetry nights, and cultural events. It's where Lucknow comes to read, eat, and breathe.

📚
Literary Sanctuary
5,000+ books to browse — the perfect companion to your coffee or sizzler.
🪔
Moroccan Lanterns & Brick Walls
Warm Edison lights, exposed brick, wooden beams — every corner is a photograph.
🌿
Nature Meets Aesthetics
Lush tropical plants, hanging pots, a green stairway — Instagrammable in the most organic way.

"Such a pleasant ambience — lovely music, a wonderful collection of books where one can dine, read and spend quality time. Quite a soothing experience."

— Tripadvisor Guest Review

Repertwahr Performante

Where art finds its stage

Lucknow's first performing arts café hosts a rotating calendar of cultural events — all set against a backdrop of 5,000 books and warm Moroccan lanterns.

From intimate acoustic sessions to poetry evenings and art installations, Performante is where the city's creative soul comes alive.

🎸 Live Acoustic Sessions —週週 evenings
📖 Poetry & Literature Nights
🎨 Art Exhibitions & Installations
🌹 Rose Festival & Seasonal Events
See Upcoming Events →

What guests say

Words over coffee

6,000+ verified reviews · 4.4 on Zomato · 4.2 on Justdial

"

Such a pleasant ambience — lovely music, and a wonderful collection of books where one can dine and read and spend quality time with loved ones. A must visit for a seafood lover.

Priya Sharma
Tripadvisor
★★★★★
"

The Drums of Heaven were absolutely incredible. Staff behaviour is exceptional, ample seating, great for large groups. The atmosphere with plants and books feels really nice and warm.

Arjun Mehta
Zomato
★★★★★
"

Books lining every wall, great food, rooftop seating — exactly the kind of cafe I was looking for. The lasagna and hot chocolate together are a lethal combination.

Neha Gupta
Google Reviews
★★★★★
"

A cafe where nature meets aesthetics. The ambience truly blows your mind — lush greenery, calm corners and a vibe that instantly relaxes you. The Moroccan lanterns add magic to evenings.

Rahul Verma
Wanderlog
★★★★★
"

The prawns in white sauce were a revelation. Service was top notch and the staff was very polite. If you're a book lover and a foodie — this is your place in Lucknow.

Sanjana Tiwari
District
★★★★☆
"

The Performante events are something else — acoustic music in front of walls of books under lantern light. Lucknow's most special cafe experience, hands down.

Vikram Singh
Tripadvisor
★★★★★
4.4
★★★★★
Based on 6,000+ verified guest reviews
The Repertwahr Promise

Every visit, an experience

📚
5,000+ Books

Browse our curated library while you dine. Every genre, every mood — the perfect companion to your coffee.

🪔
Moroccan Lanterns

Hand-picked lanterns cast a golden glow over exposed brick walls and wooden beams — an atmosphere unlike any other in Lucknow.
